score_semantics_note: fusion_ranking_score is not a calibrated probability; v2_scoreline_probability comes from V2 Dixon-Coles; eventflow_ranking_score is a non-probabilistic EventFlow ranking score.

semantics.v2_scoreline_probability: calibrated scoreline probability from V2 Dixon-Coles
semantics.fusion_ranking_score: normalized ranking score, not a calibrated probability

data_quality.note: 估算数据已降权参与；不可与真实数据同权

prematch_source_summary.summary: Brazil need win after 1-1 Morocco draw; Haiti bottom after 0-1 Scotland; Group C R2 at Philadelphia.
Haiti expected 4-3-2-1 low block and counter; Brazil 4-2-3-1 with Vinicius Raphinha Igor Thiago to break compact block.
Brazil R1: 51% possession xG 1.26 vs 1.37; Vinicius scored; balanced press vs Morocco high press.
Haiti R1: 54% possession but 0 goals xG 1.05; Pierrot 0.65 xG; possession without clear chances.
Brazil must win to avoid R3 pressure; stronger attacking intent vs pure rotation mismatch.
Brazil wide overload and half-space runs from wingers; set-piece routines with Gabriel Marquinhos aerial threat.
Market prices Brazil heavy favorite -800; over 3.5 goals favored vs low-block Haiti.

excluded_evidence_summary.summary: Referee Alejandro Hernandez (ESP) appointed; card profile moderate for WC group stage.

source_summary_deprecated.summary: Brazil need win after 1-1 Morocco draw; Haiti bottom after 0-1 Scotland; Group C R2 at Philadelphia.
Haiti expected 4-3-2-1 low block and counter; Brazil 4-2-3-1 with Vinicius Raphinha Igor Thiago to break compact block.
Brazil R1: 51% possession xG 1.26 vs 1.37; Vinicius scored; balanced press vs Morocco high press.
Haiti R1: 54% possession but 0 goals xG 1.05; Pierrot 0.65 xG; possession without clear chances.
Brazil must win to avoid R3 pressure; stronger attacking intent vs pure rotation mismatch.
Brazil wide overload and half-space runs from wingers; set-piece routines with Gabriel Marquinhos aerial threat.
Market prices Brazil heavy favorite -800; over 3.5 goals favored vs low-block Haiti.

eventflow_process_summary.summary: EventFlow 先将赛前信号映射为 6 个激活剧本，再按 balanced 模式进行比分族加权；当前主线为强队早球后比赛被打开、必须抢分队开局冒进、高位防线被速度型前锋反复冲身后。赛前可用证据 7 条，A/B级主证据 3 条，真实数据占比 95%。
eventflow_process_summary.fusion_weight_note: 最终融合使用 V2概率引擎 50% + EventFlow事件流 50%；本摘要只解释 EventFlow 侧，不改变最终分数。

scenario_activation_path.name: 强队早球后比赛被打开
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 2-0、3-0、3-1、4-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.name: 必须抢分队开局冒进
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 2-1、1-2、2-2、3-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.name: 高位防线被速度型前锋反复冲身后
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 1-2、2-2、2-3、1-3 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.name: 末段追分压上导致开放式尾段
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 2-1、1-2、2-2、3-2 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.name: 定位球成为破局点
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 1-0、2-0、2-1、1-1 等比分族。

scenario_activation_path.name: 高压陷阱制造前场失误
scenario_activation_path.interpretation: 该剧本主要抬升 1-0、2-0、2-1、3-1 等比分族。

risk_checks: 若开场无早球、红牌、点球或明确战术错位，开放式/大比分剧本应动态下调。
若赛前证据不足或多为C级摘要证据，EventFlow只作为排序辅助，不能替代V2校准概率。
当前估算数据占比 5%，需要在报告中显式披露。
